data.body: PR #49 opened (https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/pull/49) and auto-merge (squash) enabled. Implements: consolidated plan-review gate into gates.plan_review_precheck (shared by claim_compute + transition_compute); gates EVERY entry into in_progress (open/blocked/closed -> in_progress) so no side-door bypasses the gate; #47 parent-first cascade preserved with --force propagation; MCP transition_ticket exposes no force (parity with claim_ticket). Rebased onto origin/main (past #47 + #48). 605 related tests pass; ruff clean. Reviewed across 5 adversarial subagent rounds (each found+fixed a real issue: NDJSON import regression, MCP bypass asymmetry, open->blocked->in_progress side-door, closed->in_progress side-door). Awaiting CI; will close on merge.
